zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Brewse於大約1406年出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親Sir Robert Brewse38歲，母親Ela Stapleton25歲。他於1430年10月16日與Joan Calthorpe在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1482年6月17日在他的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可伍德布里奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Brewse于大约1406年出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲Sir Robert Brewse38岁，母亲Ela Stapleton25岁。他于1430年10月16日与Joan Calthorpe在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1482年6月17日在他的家乡享年77岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可伍德布里奇。

nameMeanings.name: Brewse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German and Danish   Kruse   or Dutch   Kroese  .

variants.name: Cruse
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name probably from an unidentified place in Normandy named with Old French crues, crus, creus ‘hollow’. Creuse (in Somme, Picardy) and Cruys-Straëte (formerly in Flanders, now in the French département of Nord), which have the same etymology, are alternative possibilities but seem less likely on geographical and tenurial grounds.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English crus(e) ‘bold, fierce’, although the regular development would be to Crowse (rhyming with house).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Brewse was born about 1406, in Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Robert Brewse, was 38 and his mother, Ela Stapleton, was 25. He married Joan Calthorpe on 16 October 1430, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 17 June 1482, in his hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Brewse est né environ 1406, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Brewse, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Ela Stapleton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Calthorpe le 16 octobre 1430, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 17 juin 1482, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Woodbridge, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Brewse um 1406 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Brewse 38 und seine Mutter Ela Stapleton 25. Er hat am 16. Oktober 1430 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Joan Calthorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Juni 1482 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Brewse è nato il circa 1406 nel Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Brewse, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Ela Stapleton, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan Calthorpe il 16 ottobre 1430, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 17 giugno 1482, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Brewseが約1406年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Brewseは38歳，母Ela Stapletonは25歳であった。1430年10月16日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでJoan Calthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1482年6月17日に故郷で77歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクウッドブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Brewse(이)가 대략 1406년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Brewse(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela Stapleton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1430년 10월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Joan Calthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1482년 6월 17일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 우드브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Brewse nasceu aproximadamente 1406, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Brewse, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Ela Stapleton, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Calthorpe em 16 de outubro de 1430, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de junho de 1482, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Brewse родился около 1406 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Brewse было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela Stapleton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Calthorpe 16 октября 1430 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 17 июня 1482 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности вудбридж, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Brewse nació aproximadamente 1406, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Brewse, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Ela Stapleton, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan Calthorpe el 16 de octubre de 1430, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 17 de junio de 1482, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
